prompts:
Databricks Data Intelligence Platform Prompt

Using the Excalidraw MCP tool,  Create a LEFT→RIGHT FinServ / GSI DW-focused architecture diagram optimized for live discovery edits.
Style: rounded rectangles, consistent spacing, soft pastel zone backgrounds, minimal text per box.
Layout: 7 vertical zones (columns). Boxes inside each zone stacked TOP→BOTTOM. Arrows connect zones left→right.
Add 3 “camera pan” frames (light gray rectangles) with labels for a guided walkthrough.
Add a platform guardrails bar across the bottom with pill-shaped items.

ZONE 1 (soft blue) — FINANCIAL DATA SOURCES
Stack these boxes:
- Core Banking / Loan Servicing
- GL / Subledger Extracts
- Cards & Payments Events
- KYC / CRM / Reference Data
- Market & Scenario Data
- Legacy DW / Mainframe
Arrow → Zone 2

ZONE 2 (soft orange) — INGESTION PATTERNS (EDIT LIVE)
Stack these boxes:
- Batch Loads (EOD / Intraday)
- CDC (Change Data Capture)
- Streaming (Event-driven)
- Data Contracts (Schema + SLAs)
- Asset Bundles (Deploy/Config)
Arrow → Zone 3

ZONE 3 (soft gold, CENTERPIECE) — MEDALLION + DW CORE (CENTERPIECE)
Inside this zone, create THREE stacked sections (top→bottom), each as a slightly darker mini-container with 2 bullets:
A) Bronze (Evidentiary)
- Append-only raw
- Replay + retention

B) Silver (Conform + Controls)
- Data quality gates + quarantine
- Reconciliation (GL tie-out, balances)

C) Gold (DW / Marts) [YOUR INTERVIEW FOCUS]
- Facts + Dimensions (transactions, balances)
- KPI aggregates + regulatory extracts

Under those three, add TWO foundational bars spanning full width of Zone 3:
- Delta Lake: ACID • Time Travel • CDF • Reproducibility
- Unity Catalog: Masking • Row/Column • Audit • Lineage
Arrow → Zone 4

ZONE 4 (soft purple) — COMPUTE / ORCHESTRATION
Stack these boxes:
- Workflows / Jobs (close cycles)
- Lakeflow Pipelines / ETL
- Databricks SQL Warehouses
- Serverless + Photon
Arrow → Zone 5

ZONE 5 (soft pink) — ANALYTICS + MODELS (OPTIONAL)
Stack these boxes:
- CECL / ECL Forecasting
- Stress Testing Scenarios
- Model Risk Controls (versioning, approvals)
Add a highlighted callout box (brighter border) inside Zone 5:
- AI/BI Genie (NL → SQL) [Analyst productivity]
Arrow → Zone 6

ZONE 6 (soft teal) — CONSUMPTION
Stack these boxes:
- Executive BI Dashboards
- Regulatory / Disclosure Reporting
- Analyst Drilldown (KPI → txn → evidence)
- Power BI / Tableau / Looker
- Sharing / Exports to downstream systems
Arrow → Zone 7

ZONE 7 (soft light orange) — DATA DOMAINS (GSI DELIVERY)
Stack these boxes:
- Risk
- Payments
- Finance
- Customer
- Engineering

BOTTOM PLATFORM GUARDRAILS BAR (pale yellow, spans entire diagram)
Create a wide horizontal bar under all zones.
Inside it, add pill-shaped items left→right:
- Unity Catalog Policies
- Audit + Lineage
- SDLC (Dev/Test/Prod, CI/CD, IaC)
- Observability (DQ + SLAs)
- Cost Controls (budgets/chargeback)
- Security Posture (private connectivity, egress, CMK)

CAMERA PANS (light gray frames with labels, thin border)
Add three large frames that group parts of the diagram:
1) Frame “Pan 1 — Data to Truth”: Zones 1–3 (Sources → Medallion)
2) Frame “Pan 2 — DW Production”: Zones 3–4 (Gold marts + orchestration)
3) Frame “Pan 3 — Decisions & Evidence”: Zones 5–7 (Models → Consumption → Domains)

ANNOTATIONS (small text, top-right)
- “Discovery edits: rename/remove boxes live”
- “DW loop focus: facts/dims + KPI governance + audit-ready evidence”
